title: Split Array Largest Sum
hints: Notice that if you raise the allowed maximum subarray sum, it becomes easier to fit the array into `m` parts. This monotonic relationship suggests a specific search strategy.
Use binary search on the answer. The search space ranges from the largest single element to the total sum of the array.
For a fixed candidate maximum sum, greedily pack elements into subarrays. If the number of required subarrays exceeds `m`, the candidate is too small.
